questions.question: Where should this executable plan file live?

options.label: In the existing suite
options.description: docs/plans/iphone-sessions/01-impl-plan.md — sits next to the narrative doc 01 it distills. Keeps the iPhone-sessions suite self-contained.

options.label: Skill default .plans/
options.description: .plans/wrapper-contract-tests/plan.md — the skill's standard location, separate from the docs/ narrative suite.

questions.question: Should this PR include the RED Contract A & B test files that import event-status.ts / transcript.ts (modules Impl #2 creates), so they fail until Impl #2 lands?

options.label: Include RED tests now
options.description: Author Contract A+B assertions in this PR importing the future modules; bun test is red until Impl #2. Matches doc 01's 'the failing tests ARE the spec for Impl #2'.

options.label: Defer to Impl #2
options.description: This PR ships only harness + fixtures + SCHEMA.md + guard test + the one scroll-up characterization test. Contract A/B assertions authored in Impl #2 alongside the modules.

questions.question: Schema Pinning (Gate A) needs a live claude session driven through real scenarios — permission prompt, AskUserQuestion, idle, Stop — to capture genuine hook/transcript/viewport fixtures. Who drives the live capture?

options.label: You drive, agent distills
options.description: Agent installs the throwaway dump hook + fixture helper; you run real sessions through each scenario at the keyboard; agent collects the dumps into fixtures + SCHEMA.md. Most faithful (real interactive events).

options.label: Agent attempts solo
options.description: Agent tries to script the captures via claude on this Mac. Risk: interactive scenarios (permission prompts, AskUserQuestion) are hard to trigger headlessly, so fixtures may be incomplete.
